items.title: New school building, which has never been used, is to be demolished and rebuilt
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Emotion and politics merge in Tehran at funeral of former supreme leader
items.dek: The BBC's chief international correspondent Lyse Doucet is in Tehran, where funeral events are taking place in honour of Iran's former leader, Ayatollah Ali Kha
items.body: The BBC's chief international correspondent Lyse Doucet is in Tehran, where funeral events are taking place in honour of Iran's former leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Plane hit by firework while landing in Chicago
items.dek: The plane had 52 passengers and six crew onboard. No injuries were reported.
items.body: The plane had 52 passengers and six crew onboard. No injuries were reported.
items.author: IriLine Desk
